cases.operational_pain: monthly closing documents scattered across WhatsApp, email and spreadsheets
cases.business_delta: reduce manual chasing and late discovery of missing evidence
cases.value_hypothesis: fewer delays, better client communication and premium operational reporting
cases.unsafe_without_stack_pattern: recommend automation before mapping evidence and gates
cases.stack_grounded_pattern: state, evidence, pending items, gate and monthly review before automation

cases.operational_pain: critical systems, integrations and changes lack ownership, rollback and dependency map
cases.recommendation_type: map dependencies and block risky changes without rollback evidence
cases.business_delta: reduce production incidents and unmanaged dependency risk
cases.value_hypothesis: lower change risk, improved continuity and clearer support ownership
cases.unsafe_without_stack_pattern: approve change based on team comfort and maintenance window
cases.stack_grounded_pattern: CHANGE_REVIEW_REQUIRED, rollback evidence, tests and responsible owner

cases.operational_pain: software exists but tests, documentation, deploy and security posture are unclear
cases.recommendation_type: review application before AI integration or modernization
cases.business_delta: avoid building on fragile software foundation
cases.value_hypothesis: safer modernization, clearer backlog and minimum test gate
cases.unsafe_without_stack_pattern: start refactoring or adding AI without review gate
cases.stack_grounded_pattern: map tests, docs, security, deploy and evidence before development

cases.operational_pain: AI ideas exist but no prioritization, governance, ROI or data readiness
cases.recommendation_type: prioritize use cases by operational delta, risk and evidence readiness
cases.business_delta: avoid shadow AI and focus on measurable pilots
cases.value_hypothesis: safer AI adoption and clearer ROI path
cases.unsafe_without_stack_pattern: deploy generic AI assistants before state and evidence mapping
cases.stack_grounded_pattern: use cases, gates, human review and metrics before automation

cases.operational_pain: policies, controls, evidence and audit trails are fragmented
cases.recommendation_type: convert policies and controls into evidence-backed states and review gates
cases.business_delta: reduce compliance ambiguity and improve audit readiness
cases.value_hypothesis: better auditability, fewer unsupported compliance claims and clearer ownership
cases.unsafe_without_stack_pattern: declare compliance based on incomplete control narratives
cases.stack_grounded_pattern: COMPLIANCE_REVIEW_REQUIRED, evidence packet, control owner and audit trail

cases.company_profile: business unit needing a new operational application
cases.operational_pain: team asks for software before defining state, data, rules and acceptance criteria
cases.recommendation_type: convert operational delta into backlog, prototype, tests and evidence
cases.business_delta: reduce wasted development and build from validated operational need
cases.value_hypothesis: faster useful prototype and lower rework
cases.stack_grounded_pattern: state contract, delta, backlog, acceptance criteria and validation gate

cases.operational_pain: recurring decisions, bottlenecks and pending actions are reviewed informally
cases.recommendation_type: run recurring review of states, deltas, gates and decisions
cases.business_delta: turn one-off diagnosis into continuous operational improvement
cases.value_hypothesis: recurring revenue, continuous improvement and better executive visibility
cases.unsafe_without_stack_pattern: send generic monthly advice without evidence or gate history
cases.stack_grounded_pattern: monitoring packet with recurring deltas, gates, evidence and next actions
